narrative:
Gallipolis Twp township has 2,936 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
